summary: Iteration 40 - Emergency Incidents, Client Report Dropdown, and Demo Jobs. All 24 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Client Report dropdown shows results only with 2+ chars, displays 'X MATCHES FOUND' header, has glass effect styling. 12 new demo jobs (LMN-4201 through LMN-4212) seeded with varied maintenance tasks. Emergency incident reporting implemented in Crew Lead and Crew Member apps with OSHA-compliant fields. Submit button turns red with pulse animation when incident type selected. Overview page emergency widget conditionally renders when incidents exist.
seed_data_creation: 12 new demo jobs (LMN-4201 through LMN-4212) with varied maintenance tasks spanning 120 days
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 40 verified all requested features: 1) Client Report dropdown only appears when ≥2 characters typed (placeholder shows 'Type 2+ characters to search jobs...'). 2) Dropdown shows 'X MATCHES FOUND' header with results. 3) Search for 'cedar' returns 6 matches (Cedar Point, Cedar Court entries). 4) Search for 'lake' returns 4 matches (Lakeshore, Lakewood entries). 5) Search for 'oak' returns 3 matches (Oakridge Valley, Oak Summit entries). 6) 12 new demo jobs (LMN-4201 through LMN-4212) seeded with varied service types (spring cleanup, mulching, bed edging, pruning, weeding, property maintenance). 7) Backend /api/incidents/active endpoint returns active emergency incidents (currently 0 as no emergency submissions exist). 8) Crew Lead page (CrewCapturePage) has 'Workplace incident / accident' section with INCIDENT toggle. 9) When incident toggle enabled AND incident type selected, submit button turns red with pulse animation and shows 'FILE EMERGENCY REPORT'. 10) Crew Member Dashboard has same incident reporting functionality. 11) Overview page emergency incidents widget (overview-emergency-incidents-card) conditionally renders when incidents.length > 0. 12) Widget has glass hover preview with backdrop-filter blur. 13) Metrics widgets still span full width (col-span-full). 14) Client Report nav link visible for AM, GM, Owner. 15) Coaching Loop hidden for Account Manager.

verified_features.backend_incidents_active_owner: GET /api/incidents/active returns 200 for owner with incidents array
verified_features.backend_job_search_cedar: GET /api/reports/job-search?q=cedar returns 6 results including Cedar Court and Cedar Point
verified_features.backend_job_search_lake: GET /api/reports/job-search?q=lake returns 4 results including Lakeshore and Lakewood
verified_features.backend_job_search_oak: GET /api/reports/job-search?q=oak returns 3 results including Oakridge Valley and Oak Summit
verified_features.backend_demo_jobs_varied_types: Demo jobs have varied service types (spring cleanup, mulching, bed edging, pruning, weeding, property maintenance)
verified_features.frontend_client_report_min_2_chars: Client Report dropdown placeholder shows 'Type 2+ characters to search jobs...'
verified_features.frontend_crew_lead_incident_toggle: Crew Lead page has 'Workplace incident / accident' section with INCIDENT toggle
verified_features.frontend_crew_lead_incident_fields: Incident section has OSHA-compliant fields (incident type, date/time, location, injured person, body part, description, treatment, witness)
verified_features.frontend_crew_lead_emergency_submit: Submit button turns red with pulse animation when incident type selected
verified_features.frontend_crew_lead_emergency_text: Submit button shows 'FILE EMERGENCY REPORT' when incident enabled
verified_features.frontend_overview_emergency_widget_condi: Emergency incidents widget only renders when incidents.length > 0
